title: Add pattern tag filters to Library
goal: Let users filter the kata Library by algorithm/pattern tags across built-in and imported UserKatas while preserving existing search, difficulty, and source filters.
acceptance: Kata summaries passed into the Library include tags for built-in katas, and imported UserKatas retain their tags in Library entries.
The Library exposes an accessible Pattern or Tags filter generated from available kata tags, with an All patterns/tags option.
Pattern filtering composes with existing search, difficulty, and source filters and updates the visible count correctly.
Library rows surface useful tags/pattern chips without making the row visually noisy on mobile.
Unit tests cover tag extraction/filtering, including a UserKata-only tag and a no-match state.
Playwright smoke coverage verifies filtering to a known pattern such as hash-map shows Two Sum and hides an unrelated kata.
must_ask_if: You need to rename existing tag values or rewrite public kata content broadly.
The only feasible UI is a large new section instead of extending the existing Library controls.
